Visit TemplateMo

Free HTML CSS Website Templates

TemplateMo has been providing 100% free website templates since 2008. All templates are ready to download, easy to customize, and perfect for any project. Our templates are AI-customizable, so you can upload to Claude AI to personalize colors, content, and layouts instantly.

600+
Free Templates
17+
Years Online
100%
Free Forever
0
Login Required

Why Choose TemplateMo?

AI-Customizable

Upload template files to Claude AI and customize colors, content, layouts with simple prompts.

Mobile Responsive

All templates are fully responsive and work beautifully on desktops, tablets, and phones.

Instant Download

No signup, no registration. Just click download and get your template files immediately.

Clean Code

Well-organized HTML, CSS, and JavaScript that's easy to understand and modify.

Commercial Use

Use templates for personal or commercial projects. Just keep the footer credit link.

Regular Updates

New templates added frequently with modern designs and latest web technologies.

Latest Templates

606 String Master

A modern, interactive guitar learning platform template designed for music educators and online instructors.

605 Xmas Countdown

A modern Christmas countdown template featuring sleek glassmorphism design with dark tech aesthetic.

604 Christmas Piano

A festive single-page template featuring an interactive mini piano player built with Web Audio API.

603 Nexaverse

A stunning dark glassmorphism template for digital agencies, tech startups, and creative professionals.

602 Graph Page

A dynamic one-page HTML design built for data analytics platforms and business intelligence tools.

601 Chain Summit

A sleek HTML template designed for AI, Blockchain, and cutting-edge tech conferences.

Start Building Your Website Today

Browse 600+ free templates and find the perfect design for your next project

Browse All Templates Glassmorphism Templates
